editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters, evidence tiers classified, reading time, cross-links

information_design.notes: JSON-LD + OG meta + Twitter cards on all pages. Search highlighting.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Debounced search, match highlighting, route-level lazy loading, loading spinner

code_quality.notes: Main bundle 240KB (was 878KB). No unused deps. Proper code splitting.

accessibility.notes: Evidence tier aria-labels, skip-to-content, semantic HTML

security.notes: External Stripe links, noopener noreferrer, no PII
